---
title: "Interactions Overview"
---

The interaction system allows you to add structured UI components to your course by referencing them semantically in your course YAML.

The generator resolves these references using a central interaction registry and renders them into Quarto scaffolds using reusable templates.

### Available Interaction Families

- [Tabs](tabs.qmd): Tabbed content blocks.
- [Reveal](reveal.qmd): Collapsible content for solutions or extra detail.
- [Quiz](quiz.qmd): Placeholder quiz question scaffolds.
- [Tables](tables.qmd): Structured data presentation (Coming soon).

### How to use
Add an `interactions` list to any module, session, section, or page in your `course.yml`.

```yaml
interactions:
  - type: tabs
    variant: explanation_example
```
